MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-16-26 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT. NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: THE UNOPPOSED MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF A STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. SHALL SUBMIT A PROPOSED JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $13,031.68. SEE MINI MINUTES FOR ADDITIONAL INFORMATION. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT TO DEPT. 301 A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH TRACKS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. CLERK: ROBERT WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)
